title: Creepy Baby
description: 🕷️ Creepy Baby is one of the most disturbing and unique mobs I’ve ever created for Minecraft.
body:
🕷️ Creepy Baby is one of the most disturbing and unique mobs I’ve ever created for Minecraft.

👂 Before you even see it, you’ll hear its cold, broken laugh — echoing from everywhere, crawling into your mind…

🌑 It doesn’t matter where you are — deep underground, hidden in a cave, or wandering a quiet forest — it will find you.
☁️ It floats eerily toward you, and just one hit is enough to end you.

🩸 The Creepy Baby itself is:
👶 A severed baby’s head, with hollow, dark eyes that bleed as it laughs…
😵 And it never stops staring.
🏃‍♂️ You can try to run, but once you hear the laugh, it might already be too late.

💭 Personally, I created this mob to add an unforgettable and genuinely creepy experience to my horror modpack — and honestly, it still unsettles me when I test it. If you’re looking for a horrifying addition to your world, this is it.

⚠️ Requirements
🧪 Requires: ✨ GeckoLib ✨
🎮 Version: Minecraft 1.20.1
